title: Insight Communication Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger insight communication foundations judgment so data / analytics work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Insight Communication Foundations is a leverage point inside data / analytics. It supports the broader goal of kpis, dashboards, instrumentation, and interpreting signals.
coreConcepts: Insight Communication Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good insight communication foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Insight Communication Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
